visual_disposition.question_text: The diagram shows a circle C of radius r in the first quadrant. The least distances from C to the x-axis and y-axis are 8 and 5 units. visual_disposition.review_notes: Single-page crop contains full coordinate-geometry diagram and all three subparts.

visual_disposition.review_notes: Two-page crop stack contains diagram and q10(a) on page 012 plus q10(b) continuation on page 013.
